Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4010 0 0}Heh... Are you having a hard time, Koromaru? Just keep at it. I know you can find it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}We're playing a little game I learned from Yamagishi.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Koromaru has to find a specific object by scent alone. In a way, it's like treasure hunting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_002_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You're not taking him for a walk?

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4046 0 0}Oh? You think so, too? Truth be told, I've found that hiding the target is rather fun as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4074 0 0}Apparently, police dogs undergo similar training for scent tracking as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Considering how talented Koromaru is, perhaps he'd do quite well in that field.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}I wish I could, but there's only so much space we have to work with.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}That's why I'm testing different ways to enrich his mind while we're trapped indoors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Growl all you want. I'm not telling you where it is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4032 0 0}Don't give into the puppy eyes, Aigis. We both know Koromaru is very much capable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4026 0 0}Precisely. I know you can do this, Koromaru.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}I admit, I did make this round harder. The scent is weaker, and there are more dead ends to throw him off the trail.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Not only that, but I also hid it in an elevated location that's difficult for him to access.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4059 0 0}Amada and Yamagishi said the same thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Agreed. I prepared this puzzle bearing that in mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4081 0 0}In the face of a challenge, I believe what's most important... is upholding respect.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}From where I stand, disregarding one's weakness is neither kindness nor fairness.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}In actuality, it's overconfidence, plain and simple—and no different from looking down on the opponent.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}That's why I never hold back, no matter who or what I'm up against.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4141 0 0}Yes! Très bien! I never doubted you for a moment, Koromaru.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I'm fortunate to be surrounded by such reliable friends... Perhaps that's why I can afford to be more optimistic.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After her game with Koromaru-san,[n]Mitsuru-san seems to have[n]reaffirmed her principles...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4065 0 0}I'll have to ramp up the difficulty as well so that you won't find the next one so quickly.[n]{f 1 1}
